segments.speaker: Security
segments.text: Please have your ticket ready and unzip your bag.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Sure. I have the ticket on my phone.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: No, just a water bottle. Should I throw it away?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. I'm in section 310. Which gate should I use?

segments.speaker: Usher
segments.text: You're already through the right gate. Take the escalator up two levels.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Is it easy to get a ride after the game, or does it get crazy?

segments.speaker: Usher
segments.text: It gets pretty crowded. If you can walk a few blocks first, that's usually better.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I'm still learning event-night logistics here.
